author: robin-haupt-1
description: Automatically generate a Map of Content for your vault.

manifest.author: Robin Haupt
manifest.description: Automatically generate a Map of Content for your vault
manifest.name: Map of Content

name: Map of Content

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: - For better readability, links in the view are no longer underlined

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: - Added a settings option to toggle whether the paths to the current note are displayed or not (show only it's descendants)

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
- compatibility with links in note properties 
- lots of improvements under the hood

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: - fixes #109

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: - Improved compatibility with having the view in split mode / in an editor leaf

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
- Fix: resolving of relative links not always consistent with the way Obsidian resolves them
- Fix: Ctrl/Cmd-clicking a link opens a new editor pane, but opens the link in the old one

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: - Added a command palette command to open the MOC pane

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
Changes:

- Added a settings option to display the path from the Central Note starting at the Central Note instead of the currently open one.

- Fixed a bug where links using # or ^ to reference headings or blocks weren't followed

- Added some top/bottom padding to tree items

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
New features:

- You can pin a file to navigate it's links while keeping it's Map of Content open. Just click on the little pin in the top left corner.
- The plugin can remember whether to show or hide a file's descendants in the tree view. This must be enabled in the settings.

Other changes:

- The borders in the tree view are not dotted anymore but solid.

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
New features:

- Your Map of Content will be updated automatically when you switch between notes, if you've changed any links
- There’s a new top bar with buttons to show or hide more descendants in the tree, and to update the Map of Content

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
New features:

- There's a new command in the command palette to set the currently open note as the new Central Note

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
New features:
- You can now choose to exclude certain folders from the MOC
- You can filter the filenames to exclude files that way too

Bugfixes:
- The view immediately adapts to enabling / disabling dark mode

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
Improvements:
- Transclusions now get listed as links too (Thank you [Jinnayah](https://forum.obsidian.md/t/map-of-content-plugin-release/25209/14) for the suggestion)
- The "Loading" message on startup has been made more robust (The plugin will not get stuck on it anymore if there is a problem building the MOC)

Internal changes:
- A direct reference to the view gets saved and removed when it is closed.

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
Improvements:
- Plugin works better with dark mode (the arrows and the borders of the MOC tree elements will become white)
- On startup, it doesn't show "Vault could not be analyzed" but "Please wait" message
- The little sapling image is smaller and less opaque (it shouldn't be obtrusive)

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
Improvements:
- add an icon to the view
- replace the => style arrows in the path view with proper arrows
- change the text of the "this note has no connections to Central Note" message and add a little image for decoration

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: This version is marked as running on mobile too for testing

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: Improvements: replace unicode arrows with svg elements that render on every system

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: Improvements: Make text of settings option to pick central note clearer

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
Bugfixes: 
- fixed error when plugin loads on Obsidian startup (resulted in blank view)

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: Minor improvement (does not statically reference the view)

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description:
New features:
- Dropdown buttons in the descendant view to expand / collapse sections of the tree
- Scrolls to the top of the view when a new note is opened
- Click on the up arrow in the top right corner to scroll to the top of the view

Bugfixes:
- Obsidian no longer freezes while the MOC is being rebuild

releases.author: Robin-Haupt-1
releases.description: First release
